Headline: #76 Diversey Temporary Reroute at Diversey/Cicero
ShortDescription: 76 Diversey buses are temporarily rerouted via  Diversey, Cicero, Belmont, Laramie and Diversey: due to, street blockage near Diversey/Cicero.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#76 Diversey buses are temporarily rerouted via  Diversey, Cicero, Belmont, Laramie and Diversey: due to, street blockage near Diversey/Cicero.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: 95th-bound Red Line Delays
ShortDescription: 95th-bound Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier delay at Lake. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
95th-bound Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier delay at Lake.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
